attacking_style: Attacks from breakaways on mountain stages, making decisive moves on final climbs to eliminate stronger sprinters before technical descents. Shows ability to time attacks strategically in final kilometers.
team_tactics: Bora positions him for opportunistic breakaway success and secondary classification targets (KOM points). Team allows autonomy in breakaways rather than working for protected leaders.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with technical descents where climbing ability can eliminate pure sprinters. Excels on HC climbs like Col de la Croix de Fer where sustained climbing power decides outcomes.
vulnerability: Requires breakaway scenarios to succeed; unlikely to challenge in sprint finishes or when race stays together. Needs selective fields where sprinting specialists can be dropped on climbs.
key_patterns: Wins from breakaways on mountain stages, not bunch sprints (2 observations)
Eliminates superior sprinters on climbs before technical finishes (2 observations)
Targets multiple classifications including KOM points when stage win unlikely (2 observations)
Shows exceptional climbing form in stage races, capable of solo efforts (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2017 showed exceptional climbing with stage win, but 2018 reduced to support role collecting classification points rather than contending for wins
